creator: kwiat3k@panic.pl
text:
(In reply to Kirk McKusick from comment #25)
> What is the program `vm' that you are using?

It's provided by package vm-bhyve which I recommend. :-)

> So, bottom line is that I agree that it is entirely reasonable to make the images much smaller.

Thank you very much! Can we then re-open this issue and make it actionable?
